# KR Ranches — Pasture-Raised Meat in the Yakima Valley

> KR Ranches is a family-owned ranch in Prosser, Washington (Yakima Valley) selling pasture-raised beef, pork, lamb, chicken, turkey, and farm-fresh eggs direct to customers. Whole and half animal orders are the flagship offering. Custom cut sheets, USDA-inspected processing, ranch pickup only — no shipping. Family-owned, family-run.

## What we sell

- **Beef** — pasture-raised, no hormones, no shortcuts. Available as quarter, half, or whole animal, or by the cut.
- **Pork** — heritage hogs, slow-grown for marbling. Half or whole hog.
- **Lamb** — grass-finished. Whole or half lamb.
- **Chicken** — pasture-raised, processed in small batches. Whole birds seasonally.
- **Turkey** — heritage turkeys, walking the pasture with the chickens. Reserve early for Thanksgiving.
- **Eggs** — hand-gathered, brown/blue/cream/speckled. By the dozen or flat.

## Pricing estimates (final price = hanging weight × per-pound rate at the butcher)

- Beef quarter: $750–$1,100 (~100–130 lb cut & wrapped)
- Beef half: $1,500–$2,200 (~200–250 lb cut & wrapped)
- Beef whole: $3,000–$4,400 (~400–500 lb cut & wrapped)
- Pork half: $400–$650 (~60–80 lb)
- Pork whole: $800–$1,300 (~120–160 lb)
- Lamb half: $250–$400 (~20–25 lb)
- Lamb whole: $500–$800 (~40–50 lb)
- Chicken: $25–$35 per bird
- Eggs: $8/dozen
- Individual cuts (when in freezer): $9–$26/lb depending on cut

## Order flow

1. Choose your animal and share size
2. Reserve with a deposit ($100–$500)
3. Fill out a cut sheet (we help)
4. Animal goes to USDA-inspected processor
5. About 14 days from harvest to pickup at the ranch
6. Bring coolers — we help you load

## Pickup and shipping

**Ranch pickup only.** We do not ship frozen meat. Customers pick up at the ranch in Prosser, WA. Bring coolers — we help load.

## Contact

- Phone: (360) 708-6369 (primary)
- Text: (509) 930-4858
- Email: krranchesllc@gmail.com
- Address: 141901 W Buena Vista Rd, Prosser, WA 99350
- Hours: Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 5 PM. Closed Sunday.

## Service area

Yakima Valley and Pacific Northwest. Customers drive in from Seattle, Tri-Cities, Spokane, Portland.
